title: viola disjuncta
intro: Viola disjuncta, also known as the woodland violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pansy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola disjuncta include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
